findings.title: Dynamic program CALL
findings.rationale: A dynamically resolved CALL target can divert control flow if the variable is influenced by input.
findings.remediation: Validate/whitelist the program name, or use static CALLs where possible.

findings.title: Sensitive data written to log/output
findings.rationale: A DISPLAY statement references a sensitive field, risking exposure in logs/SYSOUT.
findings.remediation: Mask or remove sensitive values before DISPLAY; avoid logging secrets/PII.

findings.title: Hard-coded IP address
findings.rationale: A hard-coded network address reduces portability and can leak environment topology.
